location: Little St. James Island, U.S. Virgin Islands
text: Andrew Farkas visited Epstein's island and was 'chased off by crazy people' with security; feared being shot.
Epstein schedule: appointments with Bjorn Lomborg and dinner with Woody Allen at NYC residence.
Epstein directed staff to book a reservation for an unnamed woman to fly to St. Thomas, January 2012.
Epstein proposed attending The Artist screening at L'Olympia Paris with symphonic orchestra, October 2012
Epstein visited Gensler architecture office in Santa Monica to discuss property renovation plans, March 2011
